Commodities.title: MLP Austin: Carolina Hogs vs Miami Pickleball Club
Commodities.why_it_matters: Hog futures reflect pork demand and corn-to-meat conversion economics.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $200 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (1% odds) on crude reach $200. Closes in 17d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $70 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Tail-risk bet (9% odds) on crude drop below $70. Closes in 17d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (LOW) $80 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Market pricing 62% odds crude will drop below $80. Closes in 17d. A move this low would ease diesel and nitrogen input cost pressure heading into side-dress and summer ops.

Energy & Inputs.title: Will Crude Oil (CL) hit (HIGH) $95 by end of June?
Energy & Inputs.why_it_matters: Lower-probability outcome (30%) that crude reach $95. Closes in 17d. Would lift farm diesel and pass through to nitrogen fertilizer cost within a few months.

Other.title: Will Naftali Bennett be the next Prime Minister of Israel?
Other.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Other.title: Will the close USD/JPY price at the end of 2026 be at least 180?
Other.why_it_matters: Reflects conditions that can affect agricultural commodity prices, input costs, or farm policy.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Marquinhos be in Brazil's Starting 11?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Brazil's crop size directly competes with US soybean exports for the global market.

Trade & Policy.title: Will Criciúma win Brazil Série B?
Trade & Policy.why_it_matters: Brazil's crop size directly competes with US soybean exports for the global market.

Economy & Markets.title: Will there be no change in Fed interest rates after the June 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 99% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will no Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 77% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.

Economy & Markets.title: Will the Fed increase interest rates by 25 bps after the July 2026 meeting?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: Fed policy moves ripple through the dollar and farm lending -- 5% YES on this outcome.

Economy & Markets.title: Will 5 Fed rate cuts happen in 2026?
Economy & Markets.why_it_matters: 1% odds of a rate cut. Lower rates reduce operating loan and land interest carrying cost -- historically supportive of commodity prices via weaker dollar.
